site_title: Grid Crop Image | Windows image crop and split tool
description_ko: Grid Crop Image는 Windows에서 스크린샷 자르기, 클립보드 이미지 붙여넣기, 다중 영역 크롭, JSON 레이아웃 저장과 불러오기, 순차 저장을 지원하는 이미지 분할 도구입니다.
description_en: Grid Crop Image is a Windows image crop and split tool for screenshot clipping, clipboard image paste, manual multi-region cropping, JSON layout save and load, and sequential export.
twitter_description: Windows image crop tool with clipboard paste, JSON crop layouts, ordered export, and reusable blog asset workflows.
repo_description: Windows image crop and split tool for screenshots, clipboard paste, JSON crop layouts, sequential export, and reusable batch workflows.
